hero.subtext: Simulate real interviews with specialized AI Mentors. We analyze your CV, personalize your learning path, and comprehensively evaluate your skills to help you ace any technical interview.

feature1.title: CV Analysis & Unique Question Generation
feature1.description: Our AI understands your CV to generate interview questions tailored to your actual experience, accurately mirroring employer expectations.

feature2.title: Time Pressure Mock Exams
feature2.description: Sharpen your quick thinking skills under time constraints with a countdown mode that simulates the most rigorous interview environments.

feature3.title: Tough Questioning AI Mentors
feature3.description: Face off against AI Mentors with diverse interview styles, from friendly to extremely challenging, helping you adapt to any scenario.

feature4.title: Voice Processing & Detailed Evaluation
feature4.description: Proprietary voice analysis technology evaluates your attitude, intonation, and technical knowledge, returning a detailed report with actionable feedback.

team.headline: The Development Team
team.subtext: The passionate individuals behind the AI interview platform.

header.title: Privacy Policy
header.promise: We are fully committed to safeguarding your personal information and data. Candidate privacy is the highest priority in our system design.

section1.title: Article 1: Transparent Data Collection
section1.body: Our system solely collects basic registration data including your Email, text information extracted from your submitted PDF or Word CV, and temporary raw audio data from your microphone during the interview session.

section2.title: Article 2: Secure AI Data Processing
section2.body: Your CV data is utilized strictly as internal context for the AI to generate relevant questions. Voice data sent through the speech recognition service is processed on the fly.
section2.callout: The system automatically destroys all raw audio files immediately after scoring is completed, pledging absolutely no retention of voice biometric data and prohibiting the use of profile data to train public AI models.

section3.title: Article 3: Advanced Technical Security Safeguards
section3.body: The platform is fortified by cutting edge technology standards, featuring data encryption over HTTPS, strict role based API access control, and absolute account security via two factor authentication to prevent unauthorized intrusion.

section4.title: Article 4: Candidate Control Rights
section4.body: You maintain total authority to edit, update, or execute a permanent deletion of your CV profile and entire interview history from our servers at any time.

header.title: Terms of Service
header.promise: Please read these terms carefully before using the platform. Your continued use of the system constitutes your acceptance of these regulations.

section1.title: Article 1: Eligibility
section1.body: Users must ensure the provision of accurate and valid information when creating an account. The system strictly prohibits any acts of impersonation, account sharing, or submission of forged documents for the purpose of fraud during the interview process.

section2.title: Article 2: Rules of AI Usage
section2.body: The platform provides AI Mentors to assist in competency assessment. Users pledge to interact civilly and not to use abusive or inciting language, nor to intentionally employ technical methods to sabotage or deceive the AI scoring system.

section3.title: Article 3: AI Liability Limitation
section3.body: AI technology may generate errors or provide incomplete assessments in certain unique situations.
section3.callout: The platform utilizes AI technology to assist in simulating scenarios and suggesting reference answers. The system assumes no legal responsibility for the absolute accuracy of the content generated by AI, and the assessment results do not replace the actual hiring decisions of enterprises.

section4.title: Article 4: Intellectual Property
section4.body: All content, algorithms, interview questions, and source code of the platform are our copyrighted property. Users are not permitted to copy, distribute, or use them for commercial purposes without prior written consent.
